title: Cat and Mouse
writer: Günter Grass, Michael Hinz, Helmut Kircher
actors: Lars Brandt, Peter Brandt, Claudia Bremer
plot: A film adaptation of the book by the same name written by Günter Grass. Pilenz, the narrator, revisits places of his World War II childhood in Germany, going through memories regarding his relationship to Mahlke, an old "friend" o...
